---
title: " A Lyme Garland: Being verses, mainly written at Lyme Regis, or upon the scenery of the neighbourhood"
---

##  A Lyme Garland: Being verses, mainly written at Lyme Regis, or upon the scenery of the neighbourhood

**Author:** Francis Turner Palgrave
**Date:** 1874
**Imprint:** Lyme: Dunster

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
